title: Palantir’s AI Pricing Power
summary: Results from Google, Microsoft and Amazon last week showed AI is still fueling cloud revenues, news that helped lift the stock market to fresh records on Friday. This week, we’ll get a clearer glimpse into whether AI can also lift the lagging prices of software stocks such as Palantir and ServiceNow

title: Trump’s strategy of accommodation with China is a historic mistake
summary: The upcoming summit in Beijing could lock in an American posture of strategic deferenceGlobal trade
